goal: Create one shared API client layer for the example app so no page does raw fetch inline.
constraints: Base URL must come from process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_OPENFANG_BASE_URL with fallback http://127.0.0.1:50051
No lib file may import from app/ or components/
No default export — named exports only
All functions must be async and return { data, error } — never throw to the caller
SSE helpers must return an AbortController so callers can cancel the stream
done_criteria: lib/openfang-client.js exports: getBaseUrl(), fetchHealth(), listAgents(), getAgent(id), sendMessage(agentId, text, stream), getHistory(agentId, limit), listChannels()
lib/openfang-events.js exports: streamChat(agentId, message, onDelta, onDone, onError) returning { abort }
lib/platform-meta.js exports: PLATFORMS array with { id, label, icon, steps[] } for each of the 5 platforms in contracts-lock
npm run build passes with 0 errors
No raw fetch() inside app/ or components/ (grep check)
escalation_rules: Escalate to coordinator if OpenFang endpoint shapes differ from contract decisions
Escalate if SSE transport requires auth headers not yet defined in contracts-lock

output_contract.format: JavaScript ESM modules, no bundler transformation required
